# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - prepare
  - build
  - deploy
  - release

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch

prepare_mr_metadata:
  stage: prepare
  image: alpine:3.19
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq git
  script:
    - |
      mkdir -p .ci
      MR_TITLE="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
      MR_DESC="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION}"
      MR_IID="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}"
      if [ -z "$MR_TITLE" ] || [ -z "$MR_DESC" ] || [ -z "$MR_IID" ]; then
        if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME" ] || [ "$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE" = "merge_request_event" ]; then
          API_URL="${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/merge_requests?state=opened&source_branch=${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}"
          MR_JSON="$(curl --silent --header "JOB-TOKEN: ${CI_JOB_TOKEN}" "$API_URL" | jq '.[0]')"
          MR_TITLE="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.title // empty')"
          MR_DESC="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.description // empty')"
          MR_IID="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.iid // empty')"
        fi
      fi
      SAFE_MR_TITLE="$(printf '%s' "$MR_TITLE" | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/[[:space:]]\+/ /g' | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/^-//;s/-$//' | cut -c1-60)"
      DEPLOY_TAG="deploy-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
      if [ -n "$SAFE_MR_TITLE" ]; then
        DEPLOY_TAG="${DEPLOY_TAG}-${SAFE_MR_TITLE}"
      fi
      {
        echo "MR_TITLE<<EOF"
        printf '%s\n' "$MR_TITLE"
        echo "EOF"
        echo "MR_DESC<<EOF"
        printf '%s\n' "$MR_DESC"
        echo "EOF"
        echo "MR_IID=${MR_IID}"
        echo "SAFE_MR_TITLE=${SAFE_MR_TITLE}"
        echo "DEPLOY_TAG=${DEPLOY_TAG}"
      } > .ci/mr.env
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: .ci/mr.env
    paths:
      - .ci/mr.env
    expire_in: 1 day
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:3.19
  needs:
    - job: prepare_mr_metadata
      artifacts: true
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache git
  script:
    - |
      BUILD_MSG="Build for ${CI_PROJECT_PATH}@${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
      if [ -n "$MR_TITLE" ]; then
        BUILD_MSG="${BUILD_MSG} | MR: ${MR_TITLE}"
      fi
      if [ -n "$MR_DESC" ]; then
        BUILD_MSG="${BUILD_MSG}\n\n${MR_DESC}"
      fi
      printf '%b\n' "$BUILD_MSG" > build_notification.txt
      git config user.email "ci@gitlab.local"
      git config user.name "GitLab CI"
      printf 'Automated build metadata\n\nMR: %s\n\n%s\n' "${MR_TITLE:-N/A}" "${MR_DESC:-No description}" > build-metadata.txt
      git add build-metadata.txt || true
      git commit -m "build(ci): ${MR_TITLE:-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}}" -m "${MR_DESC:-Automated build without MR description}" || true
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build_notification.txt
      - build-metadata.txt
    expire_in: 1 week
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:3.19
  needs:
    - job: prepare_mr_metadata
      artifacts: true
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - |
      echo "Deploying ${CI_PROJECT_PATH}@${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
      echo "Deployment tag: ${DEPLOY_TAG}"
      echo "Notification:"
      echo "Feature: ${MR_TITLE:-No MR title}"
      echo "Details: ${MR_DESC:-No MR description}"
      echo "Tagging deployment with ${DEPLOY_TAG}"
  environment:
    name: production
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'

release_notes:
  stage: release
  image: registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/release-cli:latest
  needs:
    - job: prepare_mr_metadata
      artifacts: true
    - job: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Generating automatic release notes"
  release:
    tag_name: "$DEPLOY_TAG"
    name: "Release $DEPLOY_TAG"
    description: |
      Deployment of commit $CI_COMMIT_SHA

      Merge Request: !${MR_IID}
      Title: ${MR_TITLE}

      Description:
      ${MR_DESC}
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
